positive: A minimalist, sophisticated celestial map composed of deep indigo and gold line art. The main subject is a stylized constellation of abstract geometric shapes and interconnected stars, forming the shape of a mythical flying griffin and a crescent moon. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, centered on a point of visual balance. The style should be inspired by Art Deco and ancient astrological charts, using clean, continuous linework (etching style). Incorporate scattered, single-point luminous gold dust effects that contrast sharply against the deep midnight blue background. The composition must be perfectly suitable for printing on dark fabric, with strong outlines and solid areas of color contrast. Isolated on a solid background.
